channel.title: Awesome Mac - Recent App Additions
channel.description: Recently added macOS apps tracked from awesome-mac.

item.title: MakLock
item.description: Category: Security Tools App: MakLock Description: Lock any macOS app with Touch ID, Apple Watch proximity, or password. Full-screen blur overlay on all monitors. Open Source: https://github.com/dutkiewiczmaciej/MakLock Commit: Add MakLock (#1995) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/5503dbec1469b33f191cde1fdfdec0c812a16cf4
item.content:encoded:
Category: Security Tools
App: MakLock
Description: Lock any macOS app with Touch ID, Apple Watch proximity, or password. Full-screen blur overlay on all monitors.
Open Source: https://github.com/dutkiewiczmaciej/MakLock
Commit: Add MakLock (#1995)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/5503dbec1469b33f191cde1fdfdec0c812a16cf4

item.title: Clippy
item.description: Category: Utilities / Clipboard Tools App: Clippy Description: Smart clipboard manager with content-aware previews, AI transformations, a built-in screenshot editor, and file converter. Open Source: https://github.com/yarasaa/Clippy Commit: Add Clippy (#1998) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/4460bbe4603e476506bd0e41cbc43217149b4b75
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Clipboard Tools
App: Clippy
Description: Smart clipboard manager with content-aware previews, AI transformations, a built-in screenshot editor, and file converter.
Open Source: https://github.com/yarasaa/Clippy
Commit: Add Clippy (#1998)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/4460bbe4603e476506bd0e41cbc43217149b4b75

item.title: WaifuX
item.description: Category: Utilities / General Tools App: WaifuX Description: Open-source ACG app for wallpapers, animated backgrounds, and anime videos. Website: https://jipika.github.io/WaifuX Commit: Add WaifuX fix #1992 Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/c2180cf5a3a41c12815a355768c95bae621da2e2
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / General Tools
App: WaifuX
Description: Open-source ACG app for wallpapers, animated backgrounds, and anime videos.
Website: https://jipika.github.io/WaifuX
Commit: Add WaifuX fix #1992
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/c2180cf5a3a41c12815a355768c95bae621da2e2

item.title: Desktop Control
item.description: Category: AI Tools App: Desktop Control Description: GPU-accelerated CLI for AI agents to control any macOS app via screen, mouse, and keyboard. Open Source: https://github.com/yaroshevych/desktopctl Commit: Add Desktop Control to the list of AI tools (#1991) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/a638622290d6449c6ec6d669778bb013415d9ecb
item.content:encoded:
Category: AI Tools
App: Desktop Control
Description: GPU-accelerated CLI for AI agents to control any macOS app via screen, mouse, and keyboard.
Open Source: https://github.com/yaroshevych/desktopctl
Commit: Add Desktop Control to the list of AI tools (#1991)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/a638622290d6449c6ec6d669778bb013415d9ecb

item.title: MacSift
item.description: Category: Utilities / Cleanup and Uninstall App: MacSift Description: Transparent disk cleaner for macOS Tahoe. Groups files by the owning app, moves everything to the Trash (never permanent deletion), dry-run by default. Native SwiftUI with Liquid Glass. Website: https://lcharvol.github.io/MacSift/ Commit: Add MacSift to Cleanup and Uninstall (#1987) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/3329a74f6f18036fa2295aa71cfb40620afabda7
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Cleanup and Uninstall
App: MacSift
Description: Transparent disk cleaner for macOS Tahoe. Groups files by the owning app, moves everything to the Trash (never permanent deletion), dry-run by default. Native SwiftUI with Liquid Glass.
Website: https://lcharvol.github.io/MacSift/
Commit: Add MacSift to Cleanup and Uninstall (#1987)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/3329a74f6f18036fa2295aa71cfb40620afabda7

item.title: GhostVM
item.description: Category: Developer Tools / Virtualization App: GhostVM Description: Virtualization tool for creating and managing isolated macOS virtual machine workspaces. Open Source: https://github.com/groundwater/GhostVM Commit: Add GhostVM Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b076dc331db8b9659f145e6d6d9e98351ec24b06
item.content:encoded:
Category: Developer Tools / Virtualization
App: GhostVM
Description: Virtualization tool for creating and managing isolated macOS virtual machine workspaces.
Open Source: https://github.com/groundwater/GhostVM
Commit: Add GhostVM
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b076dc331db8b9659f145e6d6d9e98351ec24b06

item.title: SwiftMTP
item.description: Category: Utilities / System Related Tools App: SwiftMTP Description: Open-source MTP device manager for browsing and transferring files between Mac and Android devices. Open Source: https://github.com/Neighbor-Z/SwiftMTP Commit: Add SwiftMTP Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/5557ef13ae2d4dfe9d5072736c5f8c46c76ffea0
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / System Related Tools
App: SwiftMTP
Description: Open-source MTP device manager for browsing and transferring files between Mac and Android devices.
Open Source: https://github.com/Neighbor-Z/SwiftMTP
Commit: Add SwiftMTP
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/5557ef13ae2d4dfe9d5072736c5f8c46c76ffea0

item.title: ChargeMonitor
item.description: Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools App: ChargeMonitor Description: Menu bar utility that displays real-time battery insights including charging power, cycle count, time to full/discharge, and highlights apps with significant energy impact. Open Source: https://github.com/CrashSystemZ/ChargeMonitor Commit: Add ChargeMonitor to Menu Bar Tools section (#1986) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/af63da0ebd63ccc2275b2ac871c7b3896fe95bf5
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools
App: ChargeMonitor
Description: Menu bar utility that displays real-time battery insights including charging power, cycle count, time to full/discharge, and highlights apps with significant energy impact.
Open Source: https://github.com/CrashSystemZ/ChargeMonitor
Commit: Add ChargeMonitor to Menu Bar Tools section (#1986)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/af63da0ebd63ccc2275b2ac871c7b3896fe95bf5

item.title: ScreenKite
item.description: Category: Design and Product / Screen Recording App: ScreenKite Description: Native screen recorder and editor with auto-zoom, AI enhancements, device mockups, and teleprompter. Website: https://www.screenkite.com/ Commit: Add ScreenKite (#1984) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/81a0cbb3a270d994828aeae2f98e67f2f95a2026
item.content:encoded:
Category: Design and Product / Screen Recording
App: ScreenKite
Description: Native screen recorder and editor with auto-zoom, AI enhancements, device mockups, and teleprompter.
Website: https://www.screenkite.com/
Commit: Add ScreenKite (#1984)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/81a0cbb3a270d994828aeae2f98e67f2f95a2026

item.title: Capso
item.description: Category: Design and Product / Screenshot Tools App: Capso Description: Free, open-source screenshot and screen recording for macOS. Area/window/fullscreen capture, MP4 & GIF recording, webcam PiP, OCR, annotations, and screenshot beautification. Open Source: https://github.com/lzhgus/Capso Commit: Add Capso - free open-source screenshot & screen recording for macOS (#1982) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/2cca10add66fbf6c1c73f224c11e70b286c0046a
item.content:encoded:
Category: Design and Product / Screenshot Tools
App: Capso
Description: Free, open-source screenshot and screen recording for macOS. Area/window/fullscreen capture, MP4 & GIF recording, webcam PiP, OCR, annotations, and screenshot beautification.
Open Source: https://github.com/lzhgus/Capso
Commit: Add Capso - free open-source screenshot & screen recording for macOS (#1982)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/2cca10add66fbf6c1c73f224c11e70b286c0046a

item.title: Kaset
item.description: Category: Audio and Video Tools App: Kaset Description: Open-source YouTube Music client with library, lyrics, podcasts, and playback controls. Open Source: https://github.com/sozercan/kaset Commit: Add Kaset to the zh/ja/ko list #1977 Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/533befd8ed6cb8fad818666f318d0b09f1674325
item.content:encoded:
Category: Audio and Video Tools
App: Kaset
Description: Open-source YouTube Music client with library, lyrics, podcasts, and playback controls.
Open Source: https://github.com/sozercan/kaset
Commit: Add Kaset to the zh/ja/ko list #1977
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/533befd8ed6cb8fad818666f318d0b09f1674325

item.title: Switzy
item.description: Category: Developer Tools / Developer Utilities App: Switzy Description: Minimalist SSH and Git profile identity management for macOS. Open Source: https://github.com/yefga/Switzy Commit: Add Switzy (#1979) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/d412dfe9ff0615d6289568f45dd6e812af0b5bf1
item.content:encoded:
Category: Developer Tools / Developer Utilities
App: Switzy
Description: Minimalist SSH and Git profile identity management for macOS.
Open Source: https://github.com/yefga/Switzy
Commit: Add Switzy (#1979)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/d412dfe9ff0615d6289568f45dd6e812af0b5bf1

item.title: Rockxy
item.description: Category: Developer Tools / Network Analysis App: Rockxy Description: Open-source HTTP(S) debugging proxy for intercepting, inspecting, modifying, and replaying requests. Open Source: https://github.com/LocNguyenHuu/Rockxy Commit: Add Rockxy Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/25d650dec398844a3a9f616952482f7e43c9e206
item.content:encoded:
Category: Developer Tools / Network Analysis
App: Rockxy
Description: Open-source HTTP(S) debugging proxy for intercepting, inspecting, modifying, and replaying requests.
Open Source: https://github.com/LocNguyenHuu/Rockxy
Commit: Add Rockxy
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/25d650dec398844a3a9f616952482f7e43c9e206

item.title: PureMac
item.description: Category: Utilities / Cleanup and Uninstall App: PureMac Description: Free, open-source macOS cleaner with no telemetry. Cleans system and user caches, Xcode junk, Homebrew cache, mail attachments, and finds large or old files. Supports scheduled auto-cleaning. Open Source: https://github.com/momenbasel/PureMac Commit: Add PureMac to Cleanup and Uninstall section (#1973) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/0fb3932f0370da154a177e282fc5cde6e96ea8a6
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Cleanup and Uninstall
App: PureMac
Description: Free, open-source macOS cleaner with no telemetry. Cleans system and user caches, Xcode junk, Homebrew cache, mail attachments, and finds large or old files. Supports scheduled auto-cleaning.
Open Source: https://github.com/momenbasel/PureMac
Commit: Add PureMac to Cleanup and Uninstall section (#1973)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/0fb3932f0370da154a177e282fc5cde6e96ea8a6

item.title: SuperCmd
item.description: Category: Utilities / Productivity App: SuperCmd Description: Open-source launcher with Raycast-compatible extensions, voice workflows, text-to-speech, memory, and AI actions. Open Source: https://github.com/SuperCmdLabs/SuperCmd Commit: Add SuperCmd Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/4d17a7d7464ba6aa032e3567263559a927a627f5
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Productivity
App: SuperCmd
Description: Open-source launcher with Raycast-compatible extensions, voice workflows, text-to-speech, memory, and AI actions.
Open Source: https://github.com/SuperCmdLabs/SuperCmd
Commit: Add SuperCmd
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/4d17a7d7464ba6aa032e3567263559a927a627f5

item.title: LiteEdit
item.category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors
item.description: Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors App: LiteEdit Description: Fast, native macOS code editor under 1 MB — Swift and AppKit, no Electron. Website: https://arietan.github.io/lite-edit/ Commit: Add LiteEdit to Text Editors (#1970) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/c165a90383c00edddb3619e13e77ac864de04f83
item.content:encoded:
Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors
App: LiteEdit
Description: Fast, native macOS code editor under 1 MB — Swift and AppKit, no Electron.
Website: https://arietan.github.io/lite-edit/
Commit: Add LiteEdit to Text Editors (#1970)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/c165a90383c00edddb3619e13e77ac864de04f83

item.title: Recordly
item.description: Category: Design and Product / Screen Recording App: Recordly Description: Open-source screen recorder and editor for polished demos, tutorials, and product videos. Website: https://recordly.dev/ Commit: Add Recordly Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/c0329d594113d951c3b5f4d55706f37da9ba3cc0

App: Recordly

Commit: Add Recordly

item.title: Lap
item.description: Category: Design and Product / Other Tools App: Lap Description: Local photo manager for browsing and organizing personal media libraries offline. Open Source: https://github.com/julyx10/lap Commit: Add Lap fix #1969 Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/647ffa67f9b8e89e7d0c9e73c4eadb728634e580

Commit: Add Lap fix #1969

item.title: CompressO
item.description: Category: Design and Product / Other Tools App: CompressO Description: Open-source tool for compressing videos and images to smaller sizes. Open Source: https://github.com/codeforreal1/compressO Commit: Add CompressO Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/8bf6add2922e6c7ab7d3fa0564ecaf556296821a
item.content:encoded:
Category: Design and Product / Other Tools
App: CompressO
Description: Open-source tool for compressing videos and images to smaller sizes.
Open Source: https://github.com/codeforreal1/compressO
Commit: Add CompressO
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/8bf6add2922e6c7ab7d3fa0564ecaf556296821a

item.title: Cadran
item.description: Category: Utilities / General Tools App: Cadran Description: Renders 22 customizable clock faces on your Mac desktop wallpaper and screensaver. Website: https://cadranapp.com Commit: Add Cadran to Utilities > General Tools (#1914) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/9e81d475101acb1f6db37b5c062000d9b2739631
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / General Tools
App: Cadran
Description: Renders 22 customizable clock faces on your Mac desktop wallpaper and screensaver.
Website: https://cadranapp.com
Commit: Add Cadran to Utilities > General Tools (#1914)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/9e81d475101acb1f6db37b5c062000d9b2739631

item.title: FunKey
item.description: Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools App: FunKey Description: Keyboard sound tool that adds mechanical-style typing audio. App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/funkey-mechanical-keyboard-app/id6469420677?platform=mac Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Menu Bar Tools
App: FunKey
Description: Keyboard sound tool that adds mechanical-style typing audio.
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/funkey-mechanical-keyboard-app/id6469420677?platform=mac
Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10

item.title: CurrentKey
item.description: Category: Utilities / Productivity App: CurrentKey Description: Assign unique icons and names to macOS Spaces and track time spent in apps. Website: https://currentkey.com Commit: Add CurrentKey — macOS Spaces-management and time tracking tool (#1845) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/fc600dcf1d9df3a5023ac4588aea9b82660ff51c
item.content:encoded:
Category: Utilities / Productivity
App: CurrentKey
Description: Assign unique icons and names to macOS Spaces and track time spent in apps.
Website: https://currentkey.com
Commit: Add CurrentKey — macOS Spaces-management and time tracking tool (#1845)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/fc600dcf1d9df3a5023ac4588aea9b82660ff51c

item.title: Santa
item.description: Category: Security Tools App: Santa Description: A binary and file access authorization system for macOS. Website: https://northpole.security/ Commit: Add Santa to the Security section (#1957) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/13643e14c058e44dc384a92af9f6477009b83a78
item.content:encoded:
Category: Security Tools
App: Santa
Description: A binary and file access authorization system for macOS.
Website: https://northpole.security/
Commit: Add Santa to the Security section (#1957)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/13643e14c058e44dc384a92af9f6477009b83a78

item.title: Revu
item.description: Category: Education App: Revu Description: Local-first spaced repetition app for macOS with FSRS scheduling, Notion-inspired UI, Anki import, study guides, exams, and forecasting. Website: https://revu.cards/ Commit: Add Revu - local-first macOS spaced repetition app (#1955) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ccfdc358cab9ed99219052cc392114102aea5755
item.content:encoded:
Category: Education
App: Revu
Description: Local-first spaced repetition app for macOS with FSRS scheduling, Notion-inspired UI, Anki import, study guides, exams, and forecasting.
Website: https://revu.cards/
Commit: Add Revu - local-first macOS spaced repetition app (#1955)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ccfdc358cab9ed99219052cc392114102aea5755

item.title: ClearanceKit
item.description: Category: Security Tools App: ClearanceKit Description: intercepts file-system access events on macOS and enforces per-process access policies. Website: https://craigjbass.github.io/clearancekit/ Commit: Add ClearanceKit to security tools list (#1958) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/a4ab493a44a732d7b9770e8779c226a50453db30
item.content:encoded:
Category: Security Tools
App: ClearanceKit
Description: intercepts file-system access events on macOS and enforces per-process access policies.
Website: https://craigjbass.github.io/clearancekit/
Commit: Add ClearanceKit to security tools list (#1958)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/a4ab493a44a732d7b9770e8779c226a50453db30

item.title: Paul
item.description: Category: Developer Tools / Databases App: Paul Description: AI-first PostgreSQL client for getting fast answers from your database with read-only access by default. Website: https://guillim.github.io/products/paul Commit: Add Paul to the ja/zh/ko list. #1956 Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/9eed57d9bd5d3cf8fa394e63bb23e6c042892ae3
item.content:encoded:
Category: Developer Tools / Databases
App: Paul
Description: AI-first PostgreSQL client for getting fast answers from your database with read-only access by default.
Website: https://guillim.github.io/products/paul
Commit: Add Paul to the ja/zh/ko list. #1956
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/9eed57d9bd5d3cf8fa394e63bb23e6c042892ae3

item.title: Paul 🐘
item.description: Category: Developer Tools / Databases App: Paul 🐘 Description: Free, AI-first postgres client for macOS. Opens in 2 seconds. Dead Simple. Website: https://guillim.github.io/products/paul Commit: Add Paul (#1956) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/d199c89ae62c3821f8b851191946311896cb1e4a
item.content:encoded:
Category: Developer Tools / Databases
App: Paul 🐘
Description: Free, AI-first postgres client for macOS. Opens in 2 seconds. Dead Simple.
Website: https://guillim.github.io/products/paul
Commit: Add Paul (#1956)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/d199c89ae62c3821f8b851191946311896cb1e4a

item.title: Buffer

Commit: Add Buffer.

item.title: Mullvad Browser
item.description: Category: Browsers App: Mullvad Browser Description: Privacy browser focused on anti-fingerprinting protection. Website: https://mullvad.net/en/download/browser/ Commit: Shorten app descriptions across localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ea3b60bc27c27ff89c0edc04144ed759004c7521
item.content:encoded:
Category: Browsers
App: Mullvad Browser
Description: Privacy browser focused on anti-fingerprinting protection.
Website: https://mullvad.net/en/download/browser/
Commit: Shorten app descriptions across localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ea3b60bc27c27ff89c0edc04144ed759004c7521

item.title: EnviousWispr
item.description: Category: Voice-to-Text App: EnviousWispr Description: Free on-device AI dictation for macOS. Runs Whisper and Parakeet speech models locally on Apple Silicon. Website: https://enviouswispr.com Commit: Add EnviousWispr to Voice-to-Text section (#1948) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/2aac3d8bbc205b0d0e0663a262cc65b2bc9f5775
item.content:encoded:
Category: Voice-to-Text
App: EnviousWispr
Description: Free on-device AI dictation for macOS. Runs Whisper and Parakeet speech models locally on Apple Silicon.
Website: https://enviouswispr.com
Commit: Add EnviousWispr to Voice-to-Text section (#1948)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/2aac3d8bbc205b0d0e0663a262cc65b2bc9f5775

item.title: markdown-quicklook
item.description: Category: QuickLook Plugins App: markdown-quicklook Description: Rendered Markdown preview with syntax highlighting, YAML front matter, configurable fonts/colors, and a menu bar toggle to switch between rendered and plain text modes. Build-from-source, one-command install. Open Source: https://github.com/ruspg/markdown-quicklook Commit: Add markdown-quicklook to QuickLook Plugins section (#1934) Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/6f0cbac0aae80f402ed3d21d73a646b9a62a147b
item.content:encoded:
Category: QuickLook Plugins
App: markdown-quicklook
Description: Rendered Markdown preview with syntax highlighting, YAML front matter, configurable fonts/colors, and a menu bar toggle to switch between rendered and plain text modes. Build-from-source, one-command install.
Open Source: https://github.com/ruspg/markdown-quicklook
Commit: Add markdown-quicklook to QuickLook Plugins section (#1934)
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/6f0cbac0aae80f402ed3d21d73a646b9a62a147b

App: TouchBridge

item.title: App Uninstaller

Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/ffcaf60b826240c20afa9d945b4bf748cae483d8
